user.title: Presence Simulator
user.description: Choose which entities to learn from and which to control while away.

data.controlled_entities: Entities to control in away mode

data_description.monitored_entities: Lights, switches, power/energy sensors, media players, etc. Their on/off and activity patterns over time are learned.
data_description.controlled_entities: Lights and switches the simulator will turn on and off to mimic someone being home.

tuning.title: Behaviour tuning
tuning.description: Defaults are sensible; adjust if you want more or less variation.

data.randomness: Randomness (chance of deviating from learned pattern)
data.min_dwell_minutes: Minimum time before an entity changes state again
data.jitter_minutes: Random timing jitter within a slot
data.max_concurrent_fraction: Max fraction of controlled entities on at once

init.title: Entities
init.description: Update which entities are monitored and controlled.

data.controlled_entities: Entities to control in away mode

data.randomness: Randomness (chance of deviating from learned pattern)
data.min_dwell_minutes: Minimum time before an entity changes state again
data.jitter_minutes: Random timing jitter within a slot
data.max_concurrent_fraction: Max fraction of controlled entities on at once

reset_model.name: Reset learned model
reset_model.description: Discard all learned activity history and start learning from scratch.

run_step.name: Run a simulation step now
run_step.description: Immediately recompute and apply away-mode decisions for the current time slot.

export_model.name: Export model summary
export_model.description: Return a summary of the learned model as a service response.
